title: That even our enemies must be loved.

source.title: ANF05. Fathers of the Third Century: Hippolytus, Cyprian, Caius, Novatian, Appendix

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That even our enemies must be loved.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: In the Gospel according to Luke: “If ye love those who love you, what thank have ye?

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: For even sinners love those who love them.”

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: Also according to Matthew: “Love your enemies, and pray for those who persecute you, that ye may be the children of your Father who is in heaven, who maketh His sun to rise upon the good and the evil, and giveth rain upon the righteous and the unrighteous.”
